The app has a very simple, clean, and user-friendly interface, which makes it easy for new investors to start investing. My experience investing in stocks, mutual funds, and IPOs has been excellent. Even today, Groww remains one of my favorite investment apps. I would definitely recommend it to anyone who is new to investing. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I have used Groww for almost 4 years and traded F&O for 3 years. My concern is that the live P&L often seems delayed when a trade moves in my favor, while losses appear immediately. Customer support did not satisfactorily address my concerns. This review reflects my personal experience and has reduced my confidence in the platform.
